author: jochembrouwer
content:
Oh wow this is interesting, EIP-8070 was created before EIP-8150 (eth/71). So based on introductions EIP-8070 should be eth/71 and EIP-8150 should be eth/72

It feels somewhat like in the case of eth/70, eth/71, and eth/72 that this should not necessarily be an "order" of which these changes should be introduced, it feels like "protocol capabilities" active or not would be better here (partial receipts on/off, BALs on/off, sparse blobpool on/off) 
(But of course this somewhat blow up the complexity as it is now possible to create multiple variants of the protocol)
